select.value: Select re.EMP_ID,re.RATIO,re.INSURE_NO, re.PRD_CODE, re.PRD_NAME, re.TA_NAME, re.BRANCH_NO_CH, re.PAY_YEAR, re.INSURE_DATE,re.STATUS_CH ,re.HOLDER_NAME ,cast(sum(ydl.TXN_AMT*ydl.RATIO)/100 as decimal(20,2)) as TXN_AMT ,cast(sum(ydl.MID_AMT*ydl.RATIO)/100 as decimal(20,2)) as MID_AMT ,cast(sum(ydl.MID_AMT*coalesce(ra.PER_FEE_RATION,0)/100*ydl.RATIO)/100 as decimal(20,2)) as PER_FEE from IBS.T1_YBDB_EMP_RELA re inner join ibs.T2_YBDB_INS_DETAIL ydl on ydl.INSURE_NO=re.INSURE_NO left join ibs.T5_YBDB_PER_FEE_RATION ra on ydl.MEASURE_DT>=ra.ST_DT and ydl.MEASURE_DT<=ra.ED_DT where {#condition#} and re.CLAIM_STATUS_ID in ('2','5') group by re.EMP_ID,re.RATIO,re.INSURE_NO, re.PRD_CODE, re.PRD_NAME, re.TA_NAME, re.BRANCH_NO_CH, re.PAY_YEAR, re.INSURE_DATE,re.STATUS_CH,re.HOLDER_NAME

vpanel.header: 返回上一级

select.value: Select ydl.EMP_ID,ydl.RATIO,re.INSURE_NO, re.PRD_CODE, re.PRD_NAME, re.TA_NAME, re.BRANCH_NO_CH, re.PAY_YEAR, re.INSURE_DATE,re.STATUS_CH ,re.HOLDER_NAME ,cast(sum(case when ydl.RATIO>0 then ydl.TXN_AMT*ydl.RATIO else ydl.TXN_AMT*100 end)/100 as decimal(20,2)) as TXN_AMT ,cast(sum(case when ydl.RATIO>0 then ydl.MID_AMT*ydl.RATIO else ydl.MID_AMT*100 end )/100 as decimal(20,2)) as MID_AMT ,cast(sum(ydl.MID_AMT*coalesce(ra.PER_FEE_RATION,0)/100*ydl.RATIO)/100 as decimal(20,2)) as PER_FEE from ibs.T2_YBDB_INS_DETAIL ydl inner join (select distinct INSURE_NO,PRD_CODE, PRD_NAME, TA_NAME, BRANCH_NO_CH, PAY_YEAR, INSURE_DATE,STATUS_CH,HOLDER_NAME from IBS.T1_YBDB_EMP_RELA) re on ydl.INSURE_NO=re.INSURE_NO left join ibs.T5_YBDB_PER_FEE_RATION ra on ydl.MEASURE_DT>=ra.ST_DT and ydl.MEASURE_DT<=ra.ED_DT where {#condition#} group by ydl.EMP_ID,ydl.RATIO,re.INSURE_NO, re.PRD_CODE, re.PRD_NAME, re.TA_NAME, re.BRANCH_NO_CH, re.PAY_YEAR, re.INSURE_DATE,re.STATUS_CH,re.HOLDER_NAME
